---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Davide Rolfi — PhD Candidate in Actuarial Science"
description-meta: "Davide Rolfi is a PhD Candidate in Actuarial Science at Bayes Business School, City St George's, University of London. His research focuses on stochastic control, pensions, life-cycle finance, portfolio choice, and sustainable investment."
---

::: {.home-hero}

::: {.home-hero-grid}

::: {.home-hero-text}

<p class="home-kicker">PhD Candidate · Actuarial Science</p>

# Davide Rolfi

<p class="subtitle">Stochastic control, pensions, life-cycle finance, and sustainable investment</p>

<p class="affiliation">Bayes Business School · City St George's, University of London</p>

<p class="intro">
I use continuous-time stochastic control to study long-term financial decisions in actuarial science, pension finance, and sustainable investment. My research focuses on how individuals, pension funds, and firms respond to financial, longevity, and sustainability-related risks.
</p>

:::

::: {.home-hero-portrait}

<div class="portrait-frame">
<span class="portrait-initials" aria-hidden="true">DR</span>
<img src="images/portrait.jpg" alt="Davide Rolfi">
</div>

:::

:::

::: {.facts-grid}

::: {}
<p class="label">Research fields</p>
<p class="value">Actuarial science, stochastic control, pension finance, life-cycle finance, sustainable investment</p>
:::

::: {}
<p class="label">Current paper</p>
<p class="value"><a href="research.html#current-paper">Optimal Sustainable Pension Investing: Continuous-Time Defined-Contribution Portfolio Choice with ESG Preferences</a></p>
:::

::: {}
<p class="label">Supervisors</p>
<p class="value">Professor Steven Haberman<br>
Dr Iqbal Owadally<br>
<span class="small-muted">Bayes Business School</span></p>
:::

::: {}
<p class="label">Contact</p>
<p class="value"><a href="mailto:davide.rolfi@bayes.city.ac.uk">davide.rolfi@bayes.city.ac.uk</a></p>
:::

:::

<div class="button-row">
<a class="btn btn-primary" href="files/CV_Davide.pdf">Download CV</a>
<a class="btn btn-secondary" href="research.html">Research</a>
<a class="btn btn-secondary" href="contact.html">Contact</a>
</div>

:::
